overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage exploring a sunlit medieval courtyard with stone architecture, a central tree, and a waterfall feature. The scene transitions from an open garden area with NPCs to a close-up view of a cascading waterfall against ancient stonework.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunlit medieval courtyard with central tree

events.description: passing the stationary armored guard positioned on the left side of the path
moving from open courtyard into the shaded area approaching the waterfall rock face

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the sunlit courtyard, observing the surroundings and approaching the central tree

notable_agents.action: armored guard standing at attention with sword drawn, saluting as the camera passes
woman in green dress walking across the courtyard path from left to right

entered.detail: elaborate gothic stone arch with decorative tracery and steps leading upward
massive mature tree with thick trunk and sprawling canopy dominating the courtyard center
medieval stone building with arched windows and timber framing details
large terracotta planter with vibrant red blooms
tall stone cliff face with cascading water visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a sunlit medieval courtyard with warm golden hour lighting. An armored guard stands at attention on the left while a woman in a green dress walks across the cobblestone path. The camera moves forward past the guard, approaching a large ancient tree at the courtyard's center, with an ornate stone archway visible to the right and a waterfall cascading down a rock face in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: shaded garden area around ancient tree approaching waterfall

events.description: woman in blue dress appears standing near the base of the large tree
camera begins circling around the tree base toward the waterfall basin

agents.ego_description: circling the large central tree and approaching the waterfall feature, observing the stone architecture

notable_agents.action: woman in blue dress standing near the tree base, then walking away toward the right as camera approaches

entered.detail: wooden bench positioned under the tree canopy for seating
ancient stone archway carved into the rock face behind the waterfall
curved stone rim of the pool collecting the waterfall water

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into a more shaded area around the massive central tree, where dense vegetation and flowers surround the trunk. A woman in a blue dress stands near the tree before moving away. The stone bench becomes visible to the right, while the waterfall rock face grows larger on the left, revealing an ancient carved archway behind the cascading water.

scene_state.functional_zone: intimate waterfall grotto with stone basin

events.description: entering the enclosed grotto area at the base of the waterfall
slowing to observe the water cascading down the carved rock face

agents.ego_description: standing near the waterfall, observing the water feature and ancient stone carvings in the rock wall

entered.detail: cluster of white and yellow wildflowers growing at the edge of the basin
damp stone wall covered in green moss and vegetation

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the waterfall closely, entering a sheltered grotto where the sky is mostly blocked by rock overhangs. The stone basin edge curves around the pool where water collects, with mossy rocks and wildflowers visible. The carved stone archway is now clearly visible behind the cascading water, and the large tree has moved to the background as the focus shifts entirely to the waterfall feature.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit medieval courtyard that gradually narrows into a sheltered, mossy grotto. It begins in the warm golden light of the open courtyard, gliding past an armored guard and a woman in a green dress toward a massive ancient tree. As the camera moves into the shade of the tree's dense vegetation and flowers, the surrounding stone architecture recedes and the distant waterfall grows larger, revealing an ancient carved archway behind the cascading water. The scene then shifts deeper into the rock overhangs, where the open sky is blocked and the focus turns entirely toward the water collecting in a stone basin. Finally, the camera settles in the intimate space of the grotto, surrounded by mossy rocks and wildflowers with the waterfall now dominating the frame.
